properties.Name: Sand Springs Campground
properties.Comments: This campground is intended to be used for hunters during the quota deer hunts only. It is part of our dog training area and is used by hunters for archery deer, small game, waterfowl, and turkey season.

properties.Name: CCC Campground
properties.Comments: Closed during summer months as requested by Berry College PD.

properties.Name: Cochran camping area
properties.Comments: Walk in only during summer months.

properties.PropName: CHATTAHOOCHEE FALL LINE WMA - FORT PERRY

properties.Name: Campground 2
properties.Comments: Walk in when gate is closed

properties.PropName: RIVER CREEK THE ROLF AND ALEXANDRA KAUKA WMA

properties.Comments: Boat-in access only, no drive up
Boat-in access only, no drive up

properties.Name: Pigeon Creek Campground
properties.Comments: Four camp sites total. Open from the start of small game season to the weekend before Memorial Day weekend (if the gate is closed, the campground can be accessed from the river or by walking in).

properties.Name: Kayak/Canoe Portage and Primitive Campground
properties.Comments: Only accessible by boat or foot travel

properties.Name: Black Point - Grover’s Island Overlook campground
